title: Robin Makes Herself Useful
description: On pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part focuses on the sky island rumor begins. The crew hears clues that point beyond normal seas, setting up the mystery of an island in the sky and the search for proof.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Sky Island Rumor Begins sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Nico Robin, Luffy, Vivi, Nami, Usopp.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You heard the speech, didn't you?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It means she decided not to come...!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: No, it only sounded like her voice!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: There's no way she won't come!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: How many ships do they have!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Or should we rather say, Capt. IGARAM!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Where's Princess VIVI giving her speech from!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: She should be there by now...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: The Marines are already almost here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'd love to go on another adventure,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But I can't...! Because you see,

summary: The crew hears clues that point beyond normal seas, setting up the mystery of an island in the sky and the search for proof.
